Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0801
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hear you'll be in that competition tomorrow. You better do your best to win.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Although, there's this guy, "Hayase," who they say's supposed to crush the competition.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0801
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2067 0 0}Oh yeah, I've heard that name before...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's pretty famous, dude. I've seen him in sports magazines.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}What's even the point of tryin' to go up against guys like that? You'll just wear yourself out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, there's a full moon soon, so I guess you can look at it as training or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_080
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I heard from Akihiko that you did well in the competition.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_080
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4031 0 0}Regardless, I'm impressed with your ability to balance so many aspects of your life successfully.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0802
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}Yeah, {f 4 1}-kun, that's amazing! You should give yourself some more credit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}If nothing else, you're at least doing something, unlike someone else I know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0802
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2041 0 0}Yeah, yeah, sticks and bones can break my, uh... Whatever...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, it's almost a full moon, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's "something" I can do! Uh, the mission, I mean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0802
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3027 0 0}Yeah, the next full moon is August 6th. That's Thursday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's likely that the enemy will be stronger than the last ones. Make sure you're ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0803
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}There will be a full moon on Thursday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure some kind of Shadow will show up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's coming up quickly, so please make sure you're fully prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0804
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}The day after tomorrow's the full moon, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 -1 0 0}I'm already gettin' fired up! Let's kick some ass![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0805_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, tomorrow's the full moon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0805_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1122 0 0}Yeah, it's still always a little nerve-racking...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you're always dependable in these types of situations, so I'm not too worried.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0805_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, aside from being ready mentally, we have to get physically prepared, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll be on standby in the dorms tomorrow, so let's get everything that we need tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}All right, then! Let's do our best, like always![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_080
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}I was just talking with everyone about Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}He'll need to be taken on walks, but we won't be assigning that duty to anyone in particular.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It would help if you could {f 0 1 2}take Koromaru out for a walk at night if it seems he wants to go for one{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0815_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}At least summer school's over now, but... doesn't it feel like we kinda wasted our summer vacation?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'll have to make a bunch of plans to make up for it. I wonder if anything's going on soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_0815_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6080 0 0}I am currently aware of a {f 0 1 2}summer festival{f 0 1 27} tomorrow and a {f 0 1 2}film festival{f 0 1 27} the following day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0815_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1067 0 0}Oh, that's right. Wait, Aigis, are you thinking about going to the festivals?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_0815_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Indeed. My data indicates that festivals and other events of the sort offer unique experiences.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}So, for investigative purposes, I plan to infiltrate such a "shindig."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0815_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Uhhhh-huh... Well, try not to stand out too much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0817_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's sooo hot... I hate this weather...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}How are you holding up, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0817_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1104 0 0}Oh, really? Sounds like you're making the most of your summer vacation![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0817_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}Yeah, this heat is the worst... I feel exhausted just sitting here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0817_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let me try to get my mind off the heat. So... the next full moon is in September, right after break...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Ugh... When I talk about it like that, it sounds like I'm preparing for an exam or something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}But anyway, there are only four Shadows left... We have to hang in there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_081
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Summer break will be ending in just under two weeks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Of course, fighting Shadows takes priority, but don't forget to dedicate time to studying as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0819
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sweatin' like a pig over here, man...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_081
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4032 0 0}Stay strong, Iori. The heat will only affect you if you allow it to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}...Of course, there are limits to that theory.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_0821_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}The next full moon will occur on September 5th.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}As such, we have approximately two weeks until our next mission.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0821
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2072 0 0}Hey, Ai-chan, you wanna go on a "mission" to get some ice cream?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_0821_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6066 0 0}...My records indicate that consumption of ice cream may lead to health risks detrimental to our ability to carry out operations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_0822_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}I would like to ask you a question.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}Why do schools temporarily close during the summer?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_0822_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}Then, after the allotted break period ends, school resumes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_IKUTSUKI_TARTAROS_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 6 -1 -1 0 0}Hmm... If the pattern stays consistent, then cases of Apathy Syndrome will soon be on the rise.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 6 -1 -1 0 0}It's a shame, since it's your summer vacation... But the Shadows don't take breaks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0824
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just one more week, and then summer vacation will be over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}We've been so busy, but I don't think I've ever had a summer vacation that was so fulfilling before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Let's keep having fun these last few days, and try not to let the summer heat bother us too much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0826
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}It really does get very hot in the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe it won't be so bad if we think of it like a sauna...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0825
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a pain dealing with this heat every day, but it's actually a good temperature for exercising.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The sympathetic nervous system gets more active in heat, and muscular blood flow increases.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's perfect for training. So if you're going to Tartarus, I'll go with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_0825
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a pain dealing with this heat every day, but it's actually a good temperature for exercising.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The sympathetic nervous system gets more active in heat, so the effects of training increase.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}These kinds of conditions are perfect for training in Tartarus. So how about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_OK_0825
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a pain dealing with this heat every day, but it's actually a good temperature for exercising.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I think I'll do some high-intensity training tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_0829
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}One week remains until the next full moon. Additionally, the Lost are increasing in number.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}I recommend continuing to assess the situation for any potential irregularities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_0830
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}It looks like there've been more of them lately... You call them "the Lost," right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't mean to be rash, but... I'd like to put my power to good use.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_083
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The moon will be full again soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure this goes without saying by now, but please make sure you're adequately prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So ten days until summer vacation's over, huh? We were just as busy as normal this year...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But Junpei seems to have as much free time as ever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}No, no, I'm enjoying my free time. It's what they call "adult composure."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_08_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you have such "composure," then hurry up and finish your homework...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0822
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* I'm bored outta my mind...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, what's the best way to actually "enjoy" free time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0822_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}There is that... But, at times like this, I'm not really tired.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
